narration_text: This truth can change how you see your struggle. When you speak God’s promises, your nervous system shifts from danger to safety. Let’s try it now. Repeat after me: I trust You with this moment. Be still, my soul. God is God. You go before me, and You are with me. I receive Your peace, not as the world gives it. I choose courage, not fear. I pray and release it, and Your peace guards my mind. Your grace is sufficient for me. You are my refuge and strength. You will never leave me. I am safe in Your love right now.
